passives.desc: Turn Start: if all enemies have [AffectionTeddy], use a powerful Skill
passives.name: The Once-loved Ones

passives.desc:
When hitting an enemy using a single-Coin Skill, inflict 3 [Laceration] Potency. Inflict 2 [DefenseDown] until the end of the next turn.
If the target already has [Laceration], inflict 5 [Laceration] Potency instead
passives.name: Grimy Iron Stake

passives.desc: If this unit was Staggered due to the Turn End effect of A Sad Embrace, gain 10 [FaintMemory] at the next Turn Start
passives.name: To Remember

passives.desc: If at less than or equal to 30% HP at Turn End: instead of inflicting 3 [AffectionTeddy] to all enemies, gain 15 [AttackDown] next turn (once per Encounter)
passives.name: To Love

passives.desc: Base Power -1 for every 3 types of negative effects on the target (max 3)
passives.name: Please Don't be Sick

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with the least number of negative effects
[WhenUse] If the target does not have any negative effects, use 'Rough Expression of Love' next turn

[WhenUse] If target has more negative effects than [FaintMemory] on self, use 'A Sad Embrace' next turn
skills.name: Expression of Love

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with the least number of negative effects
[WinDuel] Inflict 3 [AffectionTeddy] next turn
[DefeatDuel] Inflict 1 [AffectionTeddy] next turn
skills.name: Clawing

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with the least number of negative effects
[WinDuel] Inflict 3 [AffectionTeddy] next turn
[DefeatDuel] Inflict 1 [AffectionTeddy] next turn
skills.name: Violent Clawing

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] If target has [AffectionTeddy], consume [AffectionTeddy] and inflict [Curse] and [NailPersonality] equal to the value of [AffectionTeddy] consumed (consumes up to 4)
[OnSucceedAttack] If target has 4+ [Curse], consume 4 [Curse] on the target and inflict 1 [CursePackage]
If the target does not have any negative effects, deal +100% damage

skills.desc:
[CantChangeTarget]
Targets the target this unit Clashed with 'Expression of Love' last turn
skills.name: Rough Expression of Love

skills.desc:
[CantChangeTarget]
Targets the target this unit Clashed with 'Expression of Love' last turn
Fix the damage dealt against that target to 0
[StartBattle] Gain 2 [Vulnerable] until next turn
[EndBattle] Enter Staggered state
skills.name: A Sad Embrace

descs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Consume all [AffectionTeddy] on the target
- If this unit won the Clash, raise the target's Stagger Threshold by ([AffectionTeddy] consumed x 10)

skills.desc: [DefeatDuel] Deal only half damage against the enemy with this Skill
skills.name: An Old, Nostalgic Embrace
